_comment: Copy to ~/.brigade/config.json. Personal settings that follow you into every repo. Anything a repo does not override comes from here. Remove the _comment keys before use.

policy._comment: null means 'use whatever the tier says' (see skills/brigade/TIERS.md).

models._comment: Point a role at a different agent type. Absent or null keeps the shipped brigade agent.

kb._comment: Optional personal knowledge base for cross-repo heuristics. Brigade shells out to this CLI and skips silently if it is missing.

mcp.description: Personal prior art, pulled in before decomposition

prompts._comment: Short additions appended to a role's shipped prompt. Longer text belongs in ~/.brigade/overrides/agents/<role>.md instead.

append: Prefer the smallest diff that satisfies the packet. Never reformat untouched lines.
